subject: Update parameter parsing of SDNC LCM client
commit_message:
Update parameter parsing of SDNC LCM client

Issue-ID: SO-2731
Signed-off-by: Enbo Wang <wangenbo@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I4cb8b9d4efb7e3e78e7e242c04b316908987d9d7
